vulnerabilities.description: Missing Helmet middleware for securing HTTP headers.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware in the Express app to improve security posture by setting various HTTP headers.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS is not configured with a whitelist of domains.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement CORS with specific trusted domains or regex patterns in the Express app to ensure only authorized domains can access the resources.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is not implemented, exposing the API to potential DoS attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate-limiting middleware in the Express app to control the number of requests to the server within a specific time frame.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT token authentication is not visibly enforced in the current code for group management endpoints.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure JWT token authentication middleware is implemented and utilized on all endpoints related to group management, as per API contract requirements.

vulnerabilities.description: RBAC is not implemented or not visible in the code provided.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement a middleware for Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to manage permissions and secure sensitive operations based on user roles.

vulnerabilities.description: The code does not include environment variable validation which can lead to misconfigurations or sensitive data exposure.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use a library like Zod or Joi to validate environment variables at application startup to ensure they match expected formats.
